description_long: This object is a modern, three-armed candle holder with a matte black finish, supporting three cylindrical brown candles. The holder features a central vertical stem that branches into three horizontal arms, each topped with a wide, flat rim to securely hold a candle. The base is a broad, circular disc, providing stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The candles themselves are thick and uniform, with visible wicks but no signs of burning or melted wax. The overall design is minimalist and geometric, making it suitable for urban or modern environments. The materials and construction suggest durability and a focus on both function and style.
description: A modern, matte black three-armed candle holder with three thick brown candles and a wide circular base. The design is minimalist and geometric, ideal for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three brown candles evenly spaced atop the black, trident-shaped holder.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the holder and the alignment of the three candles in a straight line.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, displaying the three candles and the symmetry of the holder's arms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the candles aligned and the thickness of the holder's arms.
